111111.name: The Creative
111111.judgement: The Creative works sublime success, furthering through perseverance.
111111.image: The movement of heaven is full of power. Thus the superior man makes himself strong and untiring.

000000.name: The Receptive
000000.judgement: The Receptive brings about sublime success, furthering through the perseverance of a mare. If the superior man undertakes something and tries to lead, he goes astray; but if he follows, he finds guidance. It is favorable to find friends in the west and south, to forego friends in the east and north. Quiet perseverance brings good fortune.
000000.image: The earth's condition is receptive devotion. Thus the superior man of broad character carries the outer world.

001000.name: The Army
001000.judgement: The army. The army needs perseverance and a strong man. Good fortune without blame.
001000.image: In the middle of the earth is water: the image of the army. Thus the superior man increases his masses by generosity toward the people.

100001.name: After Completion
100001.judgement: After Completion. Success in small matters. Perseverance furthers. At the beginning good fortune, at the end disorder.
100001.image: Water over fire: the image of the condition of After Completion. Thus the superior man takes thought of misfortune and arms himself against it in advance.

010001.name: Before Completion
010001.judgement: Before Completion. Success. But if the little fox, after nearly completing the crossing, gets his tail in the water, there is nothing that would not be furthered.
010001.image: Fire over water: the image of the condition before transition. Thus the superior man is careful in the differentiation of things, so that each finds its place.
